mentions.note: Nuclear and defense supplier, 80% Navy business; rallied $76→$213 on 30-year Navy ship building plan; commercial nuclear up 122% last quarter; trades 50x forward earnings — too rich, wait for pullback.

Leading nuclear reactor supplier for military subs/carriers and commercial power; 170-year history, 70-year nuclear experience; tripled revenue/earnings as 10-year public company; positioned at intersection of national security, energy security, and AI data center power demand.
